Class GridPoint

java.lang.Object
util.GridPoint
public class GridPoint extends Object
Represents a specific coordinate point on the game grid. Handles boundary validation and provides utility methods for calculating distance and direction between points on the board.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GridPoint(int r, int c)
    Constructs a new GridPoint with the specified row and column.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    distanceTo(GridPoint other)
    Calculates the Manhattan distance between this point and another GridPoint.
    boolean
    equals(Object o)
    Compares this GridPoint to the specified object.
    int
    getCol()
    Retrieves the current column index of this point.
    int
    getColDirectionTo(GridPoint other)
    Determines the column direction required to move from this point to the target point.
    int
    getRow()
    Retrieves the current row index of this point.
    int

    Determines the row direction required to move from this point to the target point.
    void

    Sets the column index for this point.
    void
    setRow(int r)
    Sets the row index for this point.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a string representation of this GridPoint.

  • Constructor Details

    • GridPoint

      public GridPoint(int r, int c)
      Constructs a new GridPoint with the specified row and column.
      Parameters:
      r - the row index
      c - the column index
      Throws:
      CoordinateOutOfBoundException - if the provided row or column is outside the board limits

  • Method Details

    • getRow

      public int getRow()
      Retrieves the current row index of this point.
      Returns:
      the row index

    • setRow

      public void setRow(int r)
      Sets the row index for this point.
      Parameters:
      r - the new row index
      Throws:
      CoordinateOutOfBoundException - if the row is less than 0 or greater than or equal to BOARD_ROWS

    • getCol

      public int getCol()
      Retrieves the current column index of this point.
      Returns:
      the column index

    • setCol

      public void setCol(int c)
      Sets the column index for this point.
      Parameters:
      c - the new column index
      Throws:
      CoordinateOutOfBoundException - if the column is less than 0 or greater than or equal to BOARD_COLS

    • distanceTo

      public int distanceTo(GridPoint other)
      Calculates the Manhattan distance between this point and another GridPoint.
      Parameters:
      other - the target GridPoint to calculate the distance to
      Returns:
      the calculated distance (absolute row difference + absolute column difference)

    • getRowDirectionTo

      public int getRowDirectionTo(GridPoint other)
      Determines the row direction required to move from this point to the target point.
      Parameters:
      other - the target GridPoint
      Returns:
      1 if the target is below (higher row), -1 if the target is above (lower row), or 0 if they are on the same row

    • getColDirectionTo

      public int getColDirectionTo(GridPoint other)
      Determines the column direction required to move from this point to the target point.
      Parameters:
      other - the target GridPoint
      Returns:
      1 if the target is to the right (higher column), -1 if the target is to the left (lower column), or 0 if they are on the same column

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this GridPoint.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a formatted string in the pattern [row, column]

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Compares this GridPoint to the specified object. The result is true if and only if the argument is not null and is a GridPoint object that has the same row and column values as this object.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare this GridPoint against
      Returns:
      true if the given object represents a GridPoint equivalent to this point, false otherwise
